title: [ExportVerilog] Fix regression caused by finding logic op insertion points
body:
This fixes issues https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/3885 and https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/3856. 
"automatic logic" must be located at beginning of statements, hence PrepareForEmission is moving the ops to valid insertion points. The issue here was that previously insertion points were identified by IR traversal, therefore if it took O(N^2) to perform legalization in the worst case. This PR fixes the issue by caching and managing the insertion point reasonably.
